name: repo-doctor
description: A universal Codex plugin for safely understanding, reviewing, diagnosing, and changing software repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Understand, review, diagnose, and safely change software repositories.
interface.longDescription: Repo Doctor helps developers safely understand unfamiliar repositories, diagnose project health, review code with clear priorities, and analyze change impact before modifying code.
defaultPrompt: Use Repo Doctor to understand this repository before making changes.
Use Repo Doctor to run a project health check without modifying code.
Use Repo Doctor to review my current changes with P0/P1/P2/P3 priorities.
Use Repo Doctor to analyze the impact of changing a specific file or module before editing.
